channel.title: Tan Jia Yuan Janet | The Clinical Brain Lab

item.title: Tan Jia Yuan Janet
item.description: Janet graduated from Nanyang Technological University with a Bachelor of Science in Biological Sciences and Psychology (Distinction) in 2022. She worked under the Centre for Lifelong Learning and Individualised Cognition (CLIC) for an intervention study related to cognitive flexibility.

item.title: Tan Jia Yuan Janet
item.description: Janet graduated from Nanyang Technological University with a Bachelor of Science in Biological Sciences and Psychology (Distinction) in 2022. She worked under the Centre for Lifelong Learning and Individualised Cognition (CLIC) for an intervention study related to cognitive flexibility.
